title: Sensitivity list for always* blocks could include expressions
body:
always* blocks should be emitted with names in the sensitivity list, not inline expressions.  Thus anything that might be in a sensitivity list must be output first to an assign statement and referenced by name.
consider:
```
%clk = %clk2+ %clk2
always posedge clk
```
will output something like
```
always @(posedge (clk2 + clk3)
```
which is wrong
